'''walama''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:plagiosaur|plagiosaur]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-l-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:plagiosaur|plagiosaur]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| walama
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:wælæmæth|wælæmæth]] || [[word:wælæmæj|wælæmæj]] || [[word:wælæmæsh|wælæmæsh]] || [[word:wælæmæ|wælæmæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:walalamath|walalamath]] || [[word:walalamaj|walalamaj]] || [[word:walalamash|walalamash]] || [[word:walalama|walalama]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:walamath|walamath]] || [[word:walamaj|walamaj]] || [[word:walamash|walamash]] || [[word:walama|walama]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:walafmath|walafmath]] || [[word:walafmaj|walafmaj]] || [[word:walafmash|walafmash]] || [[word:walafmaf|walafmaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:walamatha|walamatha]] || [[word:walamaja|walamaja]] || [[word:walamasha|walamasha]] || [[word:walamaka|walamaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:walamath|walamath]] || [[word:walamaj|walamaj]] || [[word:walamash|walamash]] || [[word:walama|walama]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:walamathal|walamathal]] || [[word:walamajal|walamajal]] || [[word:walamashal|walamashal]] || [[word:walamakal|walamakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:walamathatha|walamathatha]] || [[word:walamajaja|walamajaja]] || [[word:walamashasha|walamashasha]] || [[word:walamaka|walamaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:walamathan|walamathan]] || [[word:walamajan|walamajan]] || [[word:walamashan|walamashan]] || [[word:walamakan|walamakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:walamathaoro|walamathaoro]] || [[word:walamajaoro|walamajaoro]] || [[word:walamashaoro|walamashaoro]] || [[word:walamakaoro|walamakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|28ebc72}}
